title: Floating Vaulting Updraft session-open: memory/state strict local instance
body: Floating Vaulting Updraft opening on agentic-engineering-enhancements under owner direction to implement the memory/state substrate local instance completion plan. Scope: strict JSON manifest/schema for the local substrate instance, provenance ledger and migration of legacy comms/events fragments into canonical comms-events, Phase 3 immune-layer routing in the portable and doctor plans, and validation. Active-claims scan found Seaworthy Swimming Sextant's prior overlapping seeded-slice claim; this is a continuation, not a conflicting new lane. No doctor implementation or root practice:substrate scripts until the strict local instance validates. No memory/state trimming for fitness.
